label: aligned
description: Uses the same validation and service helper shape as existing handlers.

label: deviating
description: Similar endpoint omits the common validation helper used by matched examples.

label: deviating
description: Similar service returns a tuple while repository examples return dictionaries.

label: aligned
description: Keeps the same try/except behavior as similar repository functions.

label: deviating
description: Adds local exception swallowing where matched examples raise upstream.

label: deviating
description: Adds extra parameters to a function family that usually takes a compact request object.

label: aligned
description: Class constructor follows the same dependency injection shape as matched classes.

label: deviating
description: Controller-like function directly performs work usually delegated to a service helper.

label: blocked
description: Staged Python syntax error should produce a blocking validation finding.

label: review
description: Many changed symbols should produce a review recommendation even without blocker findings.
